step_description: Top sessions by CPU consumption and module
narrative_hint: WebApp_OrderService is driving the dominant SQL (8fk2m9vbqt3dx) through the getOrdersByCustomer action — this is an OLTP application path being called 48,420 times. APEX_REPORTING is running the heavy aggregate join. Both the WebApp and the reporting tool are running inefficient queries. Claude should recommend: (1) add composite index on orders(customer_id, status) for the WebApp query, (2) review the APEX report query for a covering index or query rewrite, and (3) consider separating reporting workload to a read replica.
